pi_items.source: Web search confirmed: Books to Scrape is a real, publicly accessible demo website for web scraping practice (https://books.toscrape.com/). Verified through official website and multiple references in documentation.
Code analysis: Path is correctly specified in setup_screamingfrog.sh (line 17), setup_task.sh (lines 29-30), export_result.sh (line 15). Directory is created and owned by the 'ga' user as expected.
Code analysis: Path is correctly specified in setup_screamingfrog.sh (line 18), setup_task.sh (line 30), export_result.sh (line 16). Directory is created and owned by the 'ga' user as expected.

Web search and code analysis: Link Score is a legitimate Screaming Frog SEO Spider metric. Verified through official Screaming Frog documentation (https://www.screamingfrog.co.uk/seo-spider/tutorials/link-score/). It's an internal PageRank calculation on a 0-100 scale that's calculated as part of Crawl Analysis. Mentioned in verifier.py (lines 9, 57-77) as the critical column for task success.

privileged_info_summary: The task targets https://books.toscrape.com/, a real, publicly accessible demo website for web scraping practice. The export path /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/authority_audit.csv and report path /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/top_authority_pages.txt are valid Linux paths created by the environment setup. The required 'Link Score' column is a legitimate Screaming Frog SEO Spider metric calculated during Crawl Analysis, representing internal PageRank values on a 0-100 scale. The data is not synthetic; it is dynamically generated during task execution by crawling the real website and running the Screaming Frog Link Score analysis algorithm.
